## Riot Relay 1.4.1

This release cleans up the roster's rank borders, makes credential-failure messaging more accurate, speeds up League/TFT stats refreshes, and shortens the delay before automatic sign-in starts typing.

### Roster rank borders
- Removed the faint rank-tier crest image that was rendering behind/inside the rank border on roster rows. Rank borders are now pure color and glow, matching the account's rank accent, with no icon artwork layered into them.
- The independent rank icon shown at the end of each roster row is unchanged.

### Credential and sign-in messaging
- Riot Relay could not previously tell wrong credentials, pending 2FA/verification, and a slow network apart, and always reported the same "left open for 2FA" message.
- The message shown when Riot has not confirmed sign-in now explicitly calls out that this can mean wrong saved credentials, an extra verification step, or Riot simply needing more time, and points to the Riot Client window to check which one it is.

### League and TFT stats refresh speed
- OP.GG candidate summary lookups (used to resolve an exact Riot ID to a ranked summary) now run concurrently instead of one at a time.
- League and TFT platform/region discovery now run at the same time instead of only trying TFT discovery after League discovery has fully finished or failed.
- Platform discovery's probe concurrency was raised so more regions are checked in parallel per batch.

### Automatic sign-in delay
- The login form now warms up Windows UI Automation as soon as Riot's window is first detected, instead of waiting until the readiness-check loop starts. This means the fast, accurate readiness signal is available sooner and the slow fallback path is hit less often.
- The conservative fallback floor (used only when UI Automation cannot see the login form directly) was reduced from 8 seconds to 6 seconds, with polling made twice as frequent so the same total stability window is preserved.

### Validation
- All 78 automated tests pass (one test's concurrency bound was updated to match the new, intentionally higher platform-discovery concurrency).
- JavaScript syntax checks and diagnostics pass on all changed files.

### Downloads
- **EXE / NSIS:** recommended for normal installation and automatic updates.
- **MSI:** intended for managed or manual deployment.
- `SHA256SUMS.txt` contains SHA-256 hashes for published assets.

Riot Relay is unofficial community software and is not endorsed by Riot Games.
